#!/usr/bin/env bash
# setup.sh - Reads from .env.test and sets up the environment

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
ENV_FILE="${SCRIPT_DIR}/../.env.test"

if [[ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]]; then
  echo "Error: .env.test not found at $ENV_FILE" >&2
  exit 1
fi

# Load all variables from .env.test
set -a
# shellcheck source=/dev/null
source "$ENV_FILE"
set +a

# Set ADMIN_TOKEN from the API_KEY entry in .env.test
export ADMIN_TOKEN="$(cat .env.test | grep API_KEY | cut -d= -f2)"

echo "Environment set up from .env.test"
